## Verification

- [ ] Unit and integration tests pass.
- [ ] Wheel and sdist were built and smoke-tested.
- [ ] Codex or Pi contract changes cite current official documentation.
- [ ] Core and client components remain independently installable.
- [ ] Changelog and user documentation are updated.
- [ ] No prompts, credentials, private paths, sessions, or workspace data are included.
